judgment.summary: Profitable, growing company with solid returns and a reasonable forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 7.2%; next earnings date is 2026-07-24.
positives: Revenue growth 11.6% YoY and earnings growth 17.6% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 16.3% and return on equity 34.4% demonstrate excellent profitability and efficiency.
Forward P/E of 15.33x is attractive given the growth rate and sector.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 23 analysts suggests broad institutional confidence.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 177.85% is high, indicating significant leverage.
Free cash flow data is not available (n/a), making it difficult to assess cash generation.
PEG ratio of 1.52 suggests the stock may be slightly overvalued relative to its earnings growth.

news.paragraph: American Express reported its last earnings on March 31, 2026, beating analyst estimates by 7.2%. The company has a next earnings date set for July 24, 2026. With no other recent headlines, the upcoming earnings report is the primary catalyst to watch.
